headline: Nintendo's $500 Switch 2 bundle includes a game, and it's available now
summary: Nintendo's 'Choose Your Game' Switch 2 bundle is now available. The $499.99 console package includes a digital game. Find it at major retailers like GameStop, Amazon, and the Nintendo Store.

headline: Google's AI future demands trust — and your personal data
summary: Google's AI-powered future relies heavily on user trust. New tools like Gemini Spark and Daily Brief aim to simplify user lives. This future also necessitates the use of personal data.

headline: Here are our favorite Memorial Day deals (so far)
summary: Memorial Day sales offer significant discounts on gadgets. It's an ideal time to purchase items for summer activities. Look for deals on portable Bluetooth speakers and more.

headline: Democrats preview how they'd go after the Ticketmaster settlement if they regain power
summary: Democrats criticized the DOJ's 'trivial' Live Nation-Ticketmaster settlement. An unofficial Capitol Hill hearing was held to discuss the issue. They signaled plans to challenge Trump-era antitrust deals if they regain power.

headline: The Tiny Aoostar Ryzen 7 Pro 6850H Mini PC with 24GB of DDR5 RAM and USB 4 Ports Drops to $313
summary: The Aoostar Ryzen 7 Pro 6850H Mini PC is now available for $313. It features 24GB DDR5 RAM and USB 4 ports. This compact PC offers more power than a Raspberry Pi for a similar cost.

headline: VITURE XR Glasses Are 10% Off with This Exclusive Promo Code
summary: VITURE XR Glasses are currently available with a 10% discount. An exclusive promo code applies to models like Beast and Luma Ultra. This offer provides savings on advanced XR technology.

headline: Today Only, Save $900 Off the Asus ROG Flow Z13 Gaming Ultra-Portable Laptop and Tablet Hybrid
summary: Save $900 on the Asus ROG Flow Z13 gaming laptop/tablet hybrid today only. This ultra-portable device weighs just 2.65lbs. It boasts 64GB of RAM, offering significant power for gaming.

headline: Plex Announces Massive Price Hike on Lifetime Subscription Plans
summary: Plex is significantly increasing the cost of its Lifetime Pass. The new price will be $749.99, effective July 1st. This marks a substantial change for long-term Plex users.

headline: Surrey Police investigating child sex abuse allegations after Epstein files release
summary: Surrey Police have launched an investigation into child sex abuse allegations. The probe follows the recent release of the Jeffrey Epstein files. The alleged offenses date back to the 1980s and 1990s, with no arrests made yet.

headline: Channel 4 contacted by police after Married at First Sight UK rape claims
summary: Channel 4 has been contacted by police regarding 'Married at First Sight UK.' A BBC Panorama investigation uncovered allegations of rape during filming. Two women reportedly made the claims.

headline: HS2 could cost up to £102.7bn and trains will be slower than first planned
summary: HS2's projected cost could now reach £102.7 billion. Trains are expected to run slower than initially planned. This comes as the delayed and scaled-back project undergoes a 'reset.'

headline: BBC confirms new Strictly Come Dancing hosts
summary: The BBC has announced the new hosts for 'Strictly Come Dancing.' A trio of presenters will replace Tess Daly and Claudia Winkleman. Daly and Winkleman departed the popular dance competition last year.
